svg.text: 48 real hours · 240× compression · ≈1.3 simulated years of network telemetry
Any-to-Any Mesh · 4 sites · 6 bidirectional flows · TCP (ERP/replication) + UDP (VoIP/telemetry)
TCP bidir (ERP · DB replication · data sync)
UDP bidir (VoIP · telemetry · constant monitoring reverse)
Hub-Spoke · 3 spokes + hub · 4 tests · TCP (streaming) + UDP (quality + monitoring)
Traffic Pattern per Compressed Day (1 full cycle = 360 real seconds)
+ weekly component: Wednesday noon peak · weekend trough · phase_offset = -120 (daily), -450 (weekly)
BLUE — Bimodal Consumer (AM commute + PM streaming)
half-day component (period=180) produces 2 peaks · PM-bias (period=360) · weekend-lift (period=2520)
congestion events for GNN anomaly training
pattern_type: multi_sine · time_reference: elapsed · period: 360 (day) / 2520 (week) · duration: 172800 s
All 10 flows bidirectional · P-P core links 1 Gbit (never saturated) · PE-CE customer links 100 Mbit (saturates at peak)
Training minimum: 100 snapshots (5-min interval) accumulated in ≈50 real minutes after tests reach Running phase
